project: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti a umele inteligenci v Jordanskem kralovstvi
title: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti a umele inteligenci v Jordanskem kralovstvi

metadata.agency: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Posilovani kapacit verejnych vysokych skol v rozvojovych zemich (+ Ukrajina) - vyhlaseni dotacniho programu pro rok 2026

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: Cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, human resource development, modernization of teaching, building a research-oriented educational environment.

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project aims to strengthen the long-term educational and research capacities of the partner universities PSUT and GJU in the field of cybersecurity and artificial intelligence through targeted human resource development, modernization of teaching, and building research-oriented learning environments.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Jirovec Martin, Ing. (DFIT-Dean) – research leader Rysavy Ondrej, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DIFS)
